programs.title: Code Black
programs.desc: Leanne and Jesse talk a young girl through how to use supplies on board a small plane to build a makeshift defibrillator when the pilot, who is also her mother, loses consciousness.

programs.title: Jabba's Movies
programs.desc: Jabba presents his best movies to see in Autumn featuring Michael, The Devil Wears Prada 2, The Sheep Detectives, Star Wars: The Mandalorian & Grogu, plus previews the hottest flicks coming in Winter.

programs.title: Black-ish
programs.desc: Dre can't seem to land a good pitch now that he's moved up to general marketing at his firm and begins to doubt himself; Bow and Ruby question the new boy Diane is dating who doesn't necessarily meet her standards.

programs.title: The Goldbergs
programs.desc: With everyone preoccupied with the new baby on the way, Erica's graduation is met with lackluster enthusiasm from Beverly and Geoff.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three. Meanwhile, Dan bans Odessa from the house, causing a rift with Harris; and Mark makes extensive Thanksgiving plans that may inevitably fall apart.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Chaos ensues when Dan finally gets the entire family together for Thanksgiving dinner; mixed feelings about the Lunch Box continue to build tension in the house; Harris makes an unexpected move.
